three_doors.content: From trauma-informed breathwork and nervous system regulation to AI systems consulting and growth strategy — I meet you where you are, whether that's your inner world or your business.
Paddle Haus — a multigenerational indoor racquet sports + wellness club. Lighthouse Partners — off-market commercial real estate. Twin Partners — AI automation for service businesses.
Big Tech to Breathwork to Building

Fifteen years at Alphabet, Adobe, Cisco, and NVIDIA. Trained energy practitioner and breathwork facilitator. Now building at the intersection of systems, spaces, and the human operating system underneath it all.

coaching_healing.content: I hold space for people who are in the in-between. When something has shifted, but nothing is clear yet.
For moments when one pause is enough
A single session for moments when you feel stuck, unsettled, or not quite yourself. We slow down and listen to what's present. Healing and guidance are offered gently — only if needed.
A steady place to return to
For times when you're moving through an ongoing transition and want consistent support. We meet three times over the month, creating continuity and space for integration.
Integrating trauma-informed breathwork · somatic healing · energy work · mindfulness practices. A portion of each session supports global reforestation through One Tree Planted.

pull_quote.content: I don't fit neatly into one box — and I stopped trying to. The same instinct that helped me build growth engines at Alphabet and NVIDIA is the one that told me to leave and build something of my own.

ventures.content: A multigenerational indoor racquet sports and wellness social club — reimagining how communities gather, move, and connect.
Sourcing, underwriting, and structuring off-market deals across hospitality, multifamily, self-storage, and experiential assets.
Helping coaches, consultants, and service businesses scale with AI-powered systems — replacing operational chaos with clarity.
Creating living environments that support wellbeing and functionality — because spaces shape how we perform and feel.

founder_story.content: I spent fifteen years inside some of the biggest companies in the world — Alphabet, Adobe, Cisco, NVIDIA — leading teams that turned data into growth and complexity into clarity. I was the person who could see the system, find the leverage point, and build the engine.

But the deeper I went into the mechanics of scale, the more I noticed something the dashboards couldn't capture: the human operating system underneath it all. The nervous system running the meetings. The unprocessed stress shaping the strategy. The environments — physical, digital, relational — either supporting people or silently working against them.

So I started building at the intersection. I became a trauma-informed breathwork facilitator and trained energy practitioner — not to leave the business world behind, but to bring a dimension to it that most operators miss.

Today, everything I build expresses a single belief: the environments and systems people exist within shape how they perform, heal, and grow. That belief runs through every venture — from Paddle Haus to Lighthouse Partners to Twin Partners.

If we're meeting for the first time — I want you to know: I don't fit neatly into one box, and I stopped trying to. The thread that connects all of this is the same instinct that guided my corporate career: see the whole system, find where it's stuck, and build something better.

contact.content: Whether you're exploring coaching, evaluating a deal, building a team, or just want to say hello — I'd love to hear from you.
Thank you — I'll be in touch soon
